name: Applied Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured Delaware State Chartered Bank offering checking, savings, credit cards, and commercial banking with asset protection features since 1996.
description_long:
Applied Bank is a Delaware State Chartered Bank headquartered in Wilmington, Delaware, that has been operating since 1996. The bank is FDIC-insured and positions itself as Delaware's #1 rated bank, emphasizing safety and deposit protection as core differentiators in the market.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and commercial banking products. On the personal side, customers can access checking accounts, savings accounts, money market accounts, Visa debit cards, bill pay, wire transfers, and Visa credit cards. They also offer commercial and business banking products designed to serve small to mid-sized businesses. All products are accessible online 24/7 through their website, enabling customers to apply for and manage accounts remotely.

Applied Bank distinguishes itself primarily through Delaware asset protection laws. The bank emphasizes that deposits held at a Delaware State Chartered Bank can provide protection from creditor garnishment, which is a unique legal advantage compared to banks chartered in other states. The bank also highlights its high ratings and commitment to quality service, using the tagline "Making the most of your time and money."

As a legitimate FDIC-insured bank, Applied Bank is best suited for customers seeking standard banking services with the added benefit of Delaware's creditor protection laws. The main limitation is that the company's online presence provides limited detailed information about specific account features, interest rates, fees, and minimum balance requirements—essential details consumers typically need when comparing banks.
pros: FDIC-insured deposits protect up to $250,000 per account category
Delaware State Charter provides unique creditor protection benefits for deposit accounts
24/7 online account opening and management from anywhere
Full-service banking with checking, savings, money market, debit cards, and credit cards
Established institution operating since 1996 with demonstrated longevity
Active community involvement including financial literacy programs and CRA compliance
Commercial banking services available for business customers
cons: Website lacks specific details on interest rates, APYs, and account fees
No information provided about minimum balance requirements or deposit limits
Limited transparency about credit card terms, APR ranges, or rewards programs
No mention of mobile app features or mobile banking capabilities
Unclear whether the bank serves customers outside Delaware or only Delaware residents
best_for: Delaware residents seeking asset protection from creditors through state-chartered bank benefits
Small business owners needing commercial banking products and services
Customers prioritizing FDIC insurance and regulatory safety over competitive interest rates
diagnosis: Applied Bank is appropriate for customers seeking a fully-licensed, FDIC-insured bank with Delaware's unique creditor protection benefits. The primary caveat is that the website provides insufficient detail about specific account terms, fees, and interest rates needed for meaningful comparison with other banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
